name: ClawKeeper Shim
description: Thin OpenClaw plugin that forwards every tool-call decision to the clawkeeper-core Python server (POST /v1/judge).

serverUrl.description: URL of the running clawkeeper-core HTTP server.

failurePolicy.description: What to do if the server is unreachable. fail-closed blocks the tool call; fail-open lets it through.

serverUrl.label: ClawKeeper Server URL
serverUrl.help: Where the Python core listens. Default 127.0.0.1:7474.

failurePolicy.label: Failure Policy
failurePolicy.help: fail-closed is safer; fail-open avoids breaking when the server is down.
